Bash("/c/Program Files/Python313/python" -c "
import base64, os

# Step 1: Read and base64-encode the PNG
png_path = r''C:/Users/manhara7/Documents/Workfiles/Homepage/angelikamanhart.github.io/angelikamanhart.github.io/research/thumbs/collective_thumb.png''
with open\(png_path, ''rb''\) as f:
    b64 = base64.b64encode\(f.read\(\)\).decode\(''ascii''\)

print\(f''PNG file size: {os.path.getsize\(png_path\)} bytes''\)
print\(f''Base64 length: {len\(b64\)} chars''\)

# Step 2: Build the SVG
svg = f''''''<?xml version=""1.0"" encoding=""UTF-8""?>
<svg xmlns=""http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"" xmlns:xlink=""http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"" viewBox=""0 0 64 64"" width=""64"" height=""64"">
  <defs>
    <clipPath id=""rounded"">
      <rect width=""64"" height=""64"" rx=""12"" ry=""12""/>
    </clipPath>
    <filter id=""shadow"" x=""-20%"" y=""-20%"" width=""140%"" height=""140%"">
      <feDropShadow dx=""0"" dy=""1"" stdDeviation=""2"" flood-color=""#000000"" flood-opacity=""0.6""/>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <g clip-path=""url\(#rounded\)"">
    <image href=""data:image/png;base64,{b64}"" x=""-32"" y=""-32"" width=""128"" height=""128"" preserveAspectRatio=""xMidYMid slice""/>
    <rect width=""64"" height=""64"" fill=""rgba\(0,0,0,0.2\)""/>
    <text x=""32"" y=""40"" text-anchor=""middle"" font-family=""Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif"" font-weight=""bold"" font-size=""34"" fill=""white"" filter=""url\(#shadow\)"">AM</text>
  </g>
</svg>''''''

# Write the SVG
out_path = r''C:/Users/manhara7/Documents/Workfiles/Homepage/angelikamanhart.github.io/angelikamanhart.github.io/shared/favicon.svg''
os.makedirs\(os.path.dirname\(out_path\), exist_ok=True\)
with open\(out_path, ''w'', encoding=''utf-8''\) as f:
    f.write\(svg\)

print\(f''SVG written: {os.path.getsize\(out_path\)} bytes''\)

# Step 3: Verify
with open\(out_path, ''r''\) as f:
    head = f.read\(300\)
print\(f''First 300 chars:''\)
print\(head\)
")
